assertions.text: Output contains a structured verification report with pass/fail indicators for each acceptance criterion
Report verifies definePageMeta with admin layout and middleware
Report verifies table has expected columns (Avatar, Username, Email, Status, Joined Date)
Report verifies UBadge usage for status with color variants
Report verifies search input with debounce (300ms)
Report verifies pagination with nextToken cursor
Report does NOT include browser/visual verification (quick mode respected)
All 9 acceptance criteria from the PRD are addressed in the report
Report ends with a clear overall PASS/FAIL verdict
